description: Frozen visual specification for NeoMundi Barometer mapping. Any change to these bounds constitutes a version change and must be documented.

x.label: Factual-risk signal (%)
x.sublabel: measured signal — not equivalent to a false answer

y.label: Semantic variation (%)
y.sublabel: the meaning of responses changes from one run to another

x_outlier.note: The actual Y position is retained. The true off-scale value is displayed in the badge.

y_outlier.note: Not observed in current campaigns. Implement if needed.

vocabulary.zone_high_sem_low_fact: Factually sound, but meaning varies substantially
vocabulary.zone_low_sem_high_fact: Meaning remains stable, but factual-risk signal is higher
vocabulary.zone_empty_corner: Empty corner : no profile is both unstable and factually at risk
vocabulary.note: These labels are fixed. Any modification must go through specification review.

comparability_guarantee.statement: All weeks use exactly the same axis bounds, projection formulas, vocabulary structure and palette. Direct visual comparison between weeks is guaranteed without recalibration.
comparability_guarantee.axis_change_policy: Any change to domain_min, domain_max or px_per_unit increments spec_version and invalidates direct comparison with prior weeks.
